intro: Neurosorus javanicus, also known as Javanese or Java snakeroot, is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which may help to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, muscle spasms, and anxiety. The bioactive constituents of Neurosorus javanicus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which have been found to contribute to its medicinal effects. Neurosorus javanicus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also available in capsule or tablet form to support its potential health benefits.
